title: Campaign Management
description: Build a customizable campaign management system with AI and NocoBase. Connect coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode to NocoBase and use natural language to generate a campaign timeline, budget management, channel allocation, spend tracking, conversion funnel, ROI analysis, and a marketing performance dashboard — not just a prototype, but a customizable, reliable marketing operations system you can keep iterating on.
description_cn: 使用 AI 和 NocoBase 搭建可定制的营销活动管理系统。将 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode 等 Coding Agent 接入 NocoBase 后，可用自然语言生成活动时间轴、预算管理、渠道分配、花费追踪、转化漏斗、ROI 分析和营销绩效看板，不只是生成原型，而是构建可定制、可靠、可长期迭代的营销运营系统。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Campaign Command: a native gantt, KPI cards, donut charts, and data tables. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/16-campaign-management.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 营销活动指挥台:原生甘特图、KPI 卡片、环形图和数据表。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/16-campaign-management.html
